articles.title: Alexander Canseco is the 2026 Querétaro Regional Champion!
articles.snippet: 2026 Monterrey Regional finalist Alexander Canseco has won his first major title! Alexander defeated fellow Mexican player Otoniel Longorio in the finals of the Querétaro Regional Championships.

articles.title: Teams, results and all info from the 2026 Orlando Regional Championships!
articles.snippet: American player Bhushan Thumsi, also known as content creator Freezai, has won his first major title! Bhushan defeated fellow American Richard Mogollon in the finals of the Orlando Regional…

articles.title: A new wave of the Serperior the Unrivaled 7★ Tera Raid Battle event is live!
articles.snippet: This Tera Raid Battle event lasts until 9 April. Serperior the Unrivaled was last featured in September 2024, so take this chance to catch it if you didn't back then!

articles.title: Registration to the interest list for Multi-Day Passes at the 2026 World Championships is open until 23 April!
articles.snippet: An interest list for Multi-Day Passes ($120 for adults) and Multi-Day + Arena Experience Passes ($150 for adults) is now available until 23 April. Single-Day Passes ($40 to $60 for adults) will be…

articles.title: Obtain an alpha Chikorita, an alpha Tepig and an alpha Totodile in Pokémon HOME!
articles.snippet: Obtain an Alpha Chikorita, an Alpha Tepig and an Alpha Totodile in the Pokémon HOME mobile app after connecting it to Pokémon Legends: Z-A!
